channel.title: μ-blog on Arjun's Webpage
channel.description: Recent content in μ-blog on Arjun's Webpage

item.title: One Task a Day
item.description:
Stuck in a one task a day unproductive productivity regime.
Summer depression ?

item.title: placement की fearmongering
item.description: So long, placement की fearmongering करके side income कमाने वाले past years के GATE toppers और बाकी घिस्सू प्राणी। इस झक्की आदमी को अब आपकी ज़रूरत नहीं।

item.title: Creativity
item.description: I operate in short bursts of either creativity or monotonity. Most days pass by in a haze, with nothing more than half-assed bullet journaling at best. Making of lists and plans, browsing the web and collecting trivial information while living walter mitty-esque fantasies of creative fulfilment. Sometimes these menial activities get caught up in an outburst of inspiration telling me to get busy and to get my hands tied in either making a creative fantasy come true or in committing to my state mandated monotony.

item.title: Notes to self
item.description: Typing notes to self into a chatbox just feels better because there’s always the possibility that there might be someone on the other side.

item.title: Things That Are but Arent
item.description:
things that are but aren’t:

  1. Schrodinger’s cat
  2. fight club
  3. Godel’s incompleteness theorem

item.title: कुत्ते - आवाज़
item.description:
सन २०२५* : कुत्ते लोगों की आवाज़ दबा रहे हैं।

*करीबन

item.title: कुत्ते - विवाद
item.description:
सन २०२४ : कुत्ते विवाद से डरने लगे हैं।

आप किस कुत्ते के पक्ष में हैं ?

item.title: Satyr
item.description:
Some esoteric thoughts I had that I am too uninspired to articulate anymore.




But hey, at least I made all this cool shit in canva 2 years ago.

item.title: कुत्ते
item.description: सन २०२४ : सभी कुत्ते कोट पेहेन्ने लगे है।

item.title: Padyatri
item.description: पदयात्री मां चुदाए, बड़ा बड़ा लिख देना चाहिए हर सड़क पर। मोटे मोटे अक्षरों में।

item.title: The Point of No Return
item.description: Fuck it. Its no point studying now. Its quite interesting that I’ve appeared for the most difficult and challenging courses of my life with close to no preparation, and I am still expecting a good score.
